subcodes.first_line: O ye twain branches of the Blessed Tree! Your letter was received and its contents were understood. Praise be to God that in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرعان من السدره المبارکه نامه شما رسید از مضمون مفهوم گردید که الحمد لله در این
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
